seo.title: Freezable Pools — Ice-Ready Fiberglass Pools | Maxima Pools - Columbus, OH
seo.description: San Juan fiberglass pools are built to handle extreme freezing conditions. Durable, flexible, and warranty-backed — your pool performs year-round, even in Ohio winters.
seo.ogTitle: Freezable Pools — Built for Every Season | Maxima Pools
seo.ogDescription: San Juan fiberglass pools handle extreme freeze-thaw cycles without cracking. Turn your pool into a winter playground.

hero.subtitle: San Juan fiberglass pools are so strong and durable that even fully frozen, they're built to perform. Who said pools are only for summer?

playground.paragraph1: San Juan's handcrafted fiberglass pools can handle extreme freezing conditions. When winter hits, your pool becomes a solid, safe surface — perfect for ice skating and cold-weather fun.
playground.paragraph2: Unlike concrete or vinyl pools that crack and deteriorate with freeze-thaw cycles, fiberglass pools are engineered with flexibility built into their DNA.
playground.imageAlt: Frozen fiberglass pool used for ice skating

benefitsSection.intro: Built with flexibility, strength, and advanced materials that thrive where other pool types fail.

benefits.title: Durable & Flexible
benefits.description: Fiberglass naturally flexes with ground movement, significantly reducing crack risk during freeze-thaw cycles. Unlike concrete, it won't lift or fracture in deep freezes.

benefits.title: Low Maintenance
benefits.description: The smooth, non-porous gel coat finish resists algae buildup with fewer chemicals needed — even during the off-season when the pool sits dormant.

benefits.title: Easy Winterization
benefits.description: Fiberglass pools stay full (just slightly lower water level) and winterize with minimal effort. The shell structure is protected by the water itself.

benefits.title: Quick Installation
benefits.description: A short construction window makes fiberglass ideal for colder climates. Get your pool installed and ready before winter hits — in as little as 3 to 5 days.

benefits.title: Better Temperature Insulation
benefits.description: Fiberglass retains heat more efficiently than concrete, reducing summer heating costs. And in winter, ice doesn't easily adhere to the smooth surface — minimizing wear.

benefits.title: Warranty Protected
benefits.description: The Freezable Pool process is fully compatible with San Juan Pools standards and does not void the manufacturer's structural warranty.

advantages.paragraph: While concrete pools crack and vinyl liners tear under the stress of freeze-thaw cycles, San Juan fiberglass pools are engineered with reinforced composite structures that absorb movement without damage.

images.alt: Frozen pool in winter — fiberglass durability

items: Fiberglass flexes with soil movement — no cracking
Ice doesn't adhere to the gel coat surface
Pool stays full in winter, protecting the shell
No re-plastering or resurfacing needed after freezes
Non-porous finish prevents algae during dormant months
Engineered reinforcement supports frozen pool conditions

warranty.paragraph1: The Freezable Pool process offered by Maxima Pools is fully compatible with San Juan Pools standards and does not void the manufacturer's warranty.
warranty.paragraph2: Every San Juan pool is engineered with a reinforced composite structure specifically designed to support the Freezable Pool process, giving you complete peace of mind for decades to come.
warranty.imageAlt: San Juan fiberglass pool — warranty protected

craftsmanship.paragraph: Discover the hand-layup process, proprietary resin blends, and reinforced composite engineering that make San Juan the most freeze-resistant fiberglass pool on the market.

finalCta.headingLead: Ready for a Pool That Performs
finalCta.paragraph: Get a fiberglass pool that handles Ohio's harshest winters without breaking a sweat — or a shell.
